allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const p = 'public/icons/apple-touch-icon.png'; const s = fs.statSync\(p\); console.log\('size:', s.size, 'bytes'\); const p2 = 'public/apple-touch-icon.png'; const s2 = fs.statSync\(p2\); console.log\('root size:', s2.size, 'bytes'\);")
Bash(node -e "try { require\('sharp'\); console.log\('sharp ok'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('no sharp:', e.message.slice\(0,50\)\); }")
